nasb.text: For Shuppim and Hosah it was to the west, by the gate of Shallecheth, on the ascending highway. Guard corresponded to guard.

esv.text: For Shuppim and Hosah it came out for the west, at the gate of Shallecheth on the road that goes up. Watch corresponded to watch.

cnv.text: 書聘和何薩守西門，以及在斜路上的沙利基門；守衛的人相對而立。

ccb.text: 书聘和何萨抽中西门和上行之路的沙利基门，两班相对而立。
